title: delphinium decorum var. patens
intro: Delphinium decorum var. patens is a perennial plant species in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as a type of delphinium or larkspur. It is native to the mountains of New South Wales and Victoria in Australia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, and its health benefits include reducing stress and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, Delphinium decorum var. patens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
